title: The Shape of the Angels
wikitext:
[]: The Shape of the Angels             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Sat Oct 08, 2005 9:37 am Alright, so I was looking through Omake and saw the thread about how Anno supsoviley said that Shinseiki was about "sex." Now I was just thinking to myself as I often do when I realized something, A large portion of the angels are shaped like, or hinting at, genetelia. I also noticed that the other Angels seem to ahve symbolic shapes or meanings. So let's begin shall we: First Angel, Adam: http://mywebpages.comcast.net/Juzzam/NGEAngels/adam1.jpg (I'm linking so not to leech) Adam's Stockpiled shoulders are a hint from early on that the Eva's are copies of Adam. Er... Atleast I think so... Also... Adam's core unlike the other angels looks a little... *cough*vaginal*cough* Second Angel, Lilith: http://mywebpages.comcast.net/Juzzam/NGEAngels/lilith2.jpg Lillith is somewhat obvious... Remember where the LCL is coming from. Third Angel, Sachiel: http://mywebpages.comcast.net/Juzzam/NGEAngels/sachiel3.jpg Couldn't figure out Sachiel, mind helping with this one? Fourth Angel, Shamshiel: http://mywebpages.comcast.net/Juzzam/NGEAngels/shamshel4.jpg Take a look at the thing ontop of it's head and compare it to the shape of it's body... This is actually disturbing almost... 0.o Fifth Angel, Remiel: http://mywebpages.comcast.net/Juzzam/NGEAngels/ramiel5.jpg There was a theory about this once, wasn't there...? I rather not re-explain so view the thread here: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=939 Sixth Angel, Gaghsiel: http://mywebpages.comcast.net/Juzzam/NGEAngels/gaghiel6.jpg Rotate the image a bit... Gaghsiel looks like it could be something else... Seventh Angel, Isfarael: ANother one I didn't get. I thought of something but it isn't good... So I will ignore that one... Eight Angel, Sandaphlon: Yet another one i couldn't get... Although, Sandaphlon is said to be the angel that desides the gender of those born. Ninth Angel, Matariel: I can't find the picture but Matariel has a scene where LCL is coming out of it's peculiarly shaped eye... Tenth Angel, Sahagiel: Just look at this shot: http://mywebpages.comcast.net/Juzzam/NGEAngels/sahaqiel10.jpg o.0 Eleventh Angel, Yuruel: If I am not mistaken, one of the angels told by the Dead Sea Scrolls to have not killed Lillith when she begged for mercy. If one has a Yuruel pendent, Lillith cannot hurt them suposivley. When Yuruel infacts the Eva test units, it looks an awful lot like blood: http://mywebpages.comcast.net/Juzzam/NGEAngels/ireul11.jpg Twelth Angel, Leliel: Leliel's true form is a gaint circular shadow that engulfes The buildings, there is a shot I want to note for our purposes: http://evamatt.free.fr/Images/ange12_leliel_03.jpg Thirteenth Angel, Bardiel: I think it could be a refrence to Demonic possesion but I am not sure. Fourteenth Angel, Zuruel: Once more, I have no conclusion. Fiftheenth Angel, Arael: http://mywebpages.comcast.net/Juzzam/NGEAngels/arael15.jpg From this shot, Arael looks a lot like a bird... Or something that didn't come till much later: http://www.yugioh-god.com/images/LOB-125.jpg Sixteenth Angel, Armisael: I want to note not how the angel looks but what it does. How it attacks is very sexual... It takes the form of Rei to attempt to "seduce" Shinji... There is one cut where... well... look for yourself: http://www.number3p.com/sdf.swf Seventeenth Angel, Tarbiss: Tarbiss is the angel of free will and love and sex is part of free will. Tarbiss' sexual refrence is when he constantly flirts with Shinji in a sexual way. Saying things like, "I am going to bed..." "With me?" Eighteenth Angel, Humanis(Zekar): Weren't there entire threads dedicated to Humanis' sexual refrences? Note that Humanis' is the Lillith/Rei Godhead not humans themselves. Humanis as all the humans combine in the form of an angel. So that's all... I don't think that Anno intentially did most of this but it is something I noticed and wanted to share. Thankyou, Tsu-chan

[]:             Quote Post by Hand of God » Sat Oct 08, 2005 10:32 am wow never thought of that!

[]:             Quote Post by Phoenix Feet » Sat Oct 08, 2005 11:31 am Eh, this sounds like a bit of seeing what you want to see. I'll bet if we looked hard enough, each angel could be a clue telling us that Paul is dead.

[]:             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Sat Oct 08, 2005 11:39 am Phoenix Feet wrote: Eh, this sounds like a bit of seeing what you want to see. I'll bet if we looked hard enough, each angel could be a clue telling us that Paul is dead.

[]: Re: The Shape of the Angels             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sat Oct 08, 2005 5:54 pm Tsu-chan wrote: Third Angel, Sachiel: http://mywebpages.comcast.net/Juzzam/NGEAngels/sachiel3.jpg Couldn't figure out Sachiel, mind helping with this one?

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Sat Oct 08, 2005 5:59 pm Shamshel looks like a giant sex toy of some sorts.

[]:             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Sat Oct 08, 2005 7:26 pm Okay, I highlighted what I saw in Shamshiel... Please don't think I am pervert! http://tinypic.com/efp6bs.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sun Oct 09, 2005 8:46 am Looking back at the post I made about Ramiel there was a couple of things that I thought weren't very clear. So heres a better image comparing the Tree od Life and a Octahedron net (the shape of Ramiel 'flattened') I added the blue circles of course ; ) A 3D map. Tsu-Chan wrote: Okay, I highlighted what I saw in Shamshiel... Please don't think I am pervert!

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Oct 09, 2005 9:42 am Zugzwang wrote: Looking back at the post I made about Ramiel there was a couple of things that I thought weren't very clear. So heres a better image comparing the Tree od Life and a Octahedron net (the shape of Ramiel 'flattened') I added the blue circles of course ; ) A 3D map.

[]:             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Sun Oct 09, 2005 12:55 pm Octahedrons are the shape or crystals. A common source of goddly powers i Myths. Just pointing that out.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Sun Oct 09, 2005 6:08 pm octo is 8, but isn't 7 usually the like..."biblical number"? Like in the book of revalations, it was 7 angels and 7 horns and yada yada yada (I didn't really get what was going on, but I knew there were lots of 7's). Here's some stuff I scrounged up on Octahedra Via Wikipedia - "Plato conceived the four classical elements as atoms with the geometrical shapes of four of the five platonic solids that had been discovered by the Pythagoreans (in the Timaeus)... ...This concept linked fire with the tetrahedron, earth with the cube, air with the octahedron and water with the icosahedron. There was intuitive justification for these associations: the heat of fire feels sharp and stabbing (like little tetrahedra). Air is made of the octahedron; its minuscule components are so smooth that one can barely feel it..." - Platonic Solids I also got some information on how we like to use 8 sided dice for roleplaying games. >_> Maybe that'll help a bit, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon Oct 10, 2005 12:49 pm O.M.F. wrote: Ramiel is an octahedron. However, unless you can find an octahedron in some religious mythology of some kind, Ramiels mystisism connections are tenuous at best.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Oct 10, 2005 7:40 pm Zugzwang wrote: All is formed from the unfolding pattern.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Oct 10, 2005 7:41 pm Here is a topic that is simliar to this one in context http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=395

So heres a better image comparing the Tree od Life and a Octahedron net (the shape of Ramiel 'flattened') I added the blue circles of course ; ) A 3D map.
